# Vertex AI API Reference Documentation

## SDK & Language References
- Vertex AI SDK for Python (with introduction, installation, and reference guides)
- Vertex AI language model SDK reference
- gcloud CLI reference (standard and beta versions)
- Client libraries: C#, Go, Java, Node.js, and long-running operations documentation

## REST API v1 Resource Categories

**Core Resources:**
- Media uploads, Operations management, Projects/Locations

**Job Management:**
- Batch Prediction Jobs, Custom Jobs, Hyperparameter Tuning Jobs, NAS Jobs, Pipeline Jobs, Training Pipelines, Tuning Jobs

**Model & Deployment:**
- Models, Endpoints, Deployment Resource Pools, Index Endpoints, Indexes, Publishers Models

**Feature Management:**
- Feature Groups, Feature Online Stores, Feature Stores, Feature Views, Features with monitoring capabilities

**Data & Metadata:**
- Datasets, Data Items, Annotations, Metadata Stores (artifacts, contexts, executions)

**Advanced Features:**
- Cached Contents, RAG Corpora/Files, Reasoning Engines with Sandbox Environments, Schedules, Specialist Pools

**ML Optimization:**
- Studies, Trials, Tensorboards, Experiments, Runs, Time Series data

## REST API v1beta1 Additional Resources

Includes all v1 features plus:
- Example Stores, Extensions, Feature Monitors, Evaluation datasets, Model Monitors, Model Monitoring Jobs, Chat completions endpoint

## Data Type References
The documentation lists 50+ type definitions including Content, Explanation, Features, Predictions, Tensors, and specialized data structures for model training and evaluation.

## Last Fetched
2026-03-24 - No changes detected from previous fetch.
